description_long: This is a round woven picnic basket with a single, tall, arching handle attached to opposite sides of the rim. The basket's body features a tightly interlaced weave in a natural tan color, while the exterior is adorned with a bold, dark geometric diamond pattern encircling its sides. The handle is made from the same material as the basket and appears sturdy, with a smooth, slightly curved profile. The interior of the basket is spacious and open, with a consistent woven pattern on the base and sides. There is no lid present, leaving the contents easily accessible. The overall craftsmanship suggests a traditional, handwoven construction, suitable for carrying food or personal items in urban parks or outdoor settings.
description: A round, handwoven picnic basket with a tall arching handle and a bold dark diamond pattern around its sides. The basket is open-topped and features a tightly woven natural tan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open basket with the arching handle and the geometric diamond pattern clearly visible on the side.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle aligned vertically, partially obscuring the basket's interior and highlighting the continuous diamond pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open basket and the decorative pattern, with the handle arching over.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle centered, again partially blocking the view of the interior and emphasizing the basket's round shape.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed arching handle, round cross-section, woven from the same material as the basket, attached at two opposite rim points.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave on the interior and base; exterior features a decorative, bold diamond pattern with contrasting colors.
